headline: Rockies' Kyle Freeland: On cusp of activation
body: Freeland (shoulder) threw a bullpen session with no issues Sunday and is expected to be reinstated from the injured list during the three-game series against the Reds that begins Tuesday, Kevin Henry of The Denver Gazette reports.

headline: Braves' Sean Murphy: Staying on rehab assignment for now
body: Murphy (hip) will remain on a rehab assignment with High-A Rome this week, Lindsay Crosby of BravesToday.com reports.

headline: Reds' Caleb Ferguson: Starting rehab stint
body: The Reds assigned Ferguson to Double-A Chattanooga to begin rehab assignment Tuesday.

headline: Yankees' Elmer Rodriguez: Slated for MLB debut Wednesday
body: Yankees manager Aaron Boone said Tuesday on the "Talkin' Yanks" podcast by Jomboy Media that Rodriguez will be recalled from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre to make his major-league debut Wednesday versus the Rangers.

headline: Diamondbacks' Zac Gallen: Should make next start
body: Manager Torey Lovullo said Sunday that Gallen (shoulder) was feeling better, and the club is "encouraged" the right-hander will make his next turn through the rotation, Nick Piecoro of The Arizona Republic reports.

headline: Pirates' Jared Jones: Beginning rehab assignment
body: Pirates GM Ben Cherington said that Jones (elbow) will begin a rehab assignment Wednesday with Single-A Bradenton, Jason Mackey of MLB.com reports.

headline: Yankees' Max Schuemann: Will be called up
body: Yankees manager Aaron Boone said Tuesday on the "Talkin' Yanks" podcast by Jomboy Media that Schuemann will be recalled from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre to take the roster spot of the injured Giancarlo Stanton (calf).

headline: Braves' Dylan Lee: Moves to paternity list
body: Atlanta placed Lee on the paternity list Tuesday.

headline: Marlins' Jakob Marsee: On base four times in Monday's loss
body: Marsee went 2-for-3 with two walks, a double and a run scored in Monday's loss to the Dodgers.

headline: Braves' Didier Fuentes: Back with big club
body: Atlanta recalled Fuentes from Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.

headline: Marlins' Pete Fairbanks: Could be dealing with nerve issue
body: Fairbanks described the issue that took him off the mound Monday as numbness in his pitching hand, a potential recurrence of the nerve issue that sidelined him in April 2024 while with the Rays, Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports. "Just a lot of diminished sensation," Fairbanks said after the game. "Felt like any movement of the wrist would exacerbate just loss of sensation in the index finger. So we'll see where it goes and how to work on it."

headline: Red Sox's Marcelo Mayer: Bat coming around
body: Mayer went 2-for-3 with a walk, an RBI and a run scored in Monday's 5-0 win over Toronto.

headline: Red Sox's Carlos Narvaez: Extends hit streak
body: Narvaez went 1-for-4 with a solo home run in Monday's 5-0 win over the Blue Jays.

headline: Rangers' Joc Pederson: Launches pinch hit homer
body: Pederson went 1-for-2 with a solo home run in Monday's 4-2 loss to the Yankees.

headline: Rangers' Josh Jung: Moved to second in order
body: Jung batted second and went 1-for-2 with two walks in Monday's 4-2 loss to the Yankees. He was also caught stealing.

headline: Guardians' Daniel Schneemann: Goes deep in loss
body: Schneemann started at second base and went 1-for-4 with a two-run home run in Monday's 3-2 loss to the Rays.

headline: Guardians' Juan Brito: Expected to be optioned
body: The Guardians plan to option Brito to Triple-A Columbus on Tuesday, Zack Meisel of The Athletic reports.

headline: Dodgers' Kyle Tucker: Lifts Dodgers to win Monday
body: Tucker went 1-for-5 with a walk-off two-RBI single in Monday's win over the Marlins.

headline: Marlins' Liam Hicks: Clubs three-run homer in loss
body: Hicks went 1-for-4 with a three-run home run in Monday's loss to the Dodgers.

headline: Marlins' Tyler Phillips: Charged with blown save Monday
body: Phillips blew the save in Monday's 5-4 loss against the Dodgers. He allowed two inherited runners to score on a hit and no walks while striking out one over one-third of an inning.

headline: Dodgers' Yoshinobu Yamamoto: Shaky in no-decision
body: Yamamoto did not factor into the decision Monday, allowing four runs (three earned) on five hits and four walks over five innings against the Marlins. He struck out four.

headline: Marlins' Chris Paddack: Lasts four innings Monday
body: Paddack did not factor into the decision Monday, allowing two runs on four hits and a walk over four innings against the Dodgers. He struck out one.

headline: Cubs' Moises Ballesteros: Crushes grand slam in loss
body: Ballesteros went 1-for-4 with a grand slam in Monday's 9-7 loss against the Padres.

headline: Padres' Nick Castellanos: Drives in two runs Monday
body: Castellanos went 1-for-4 with two RBI in Monday's win over the Cubs.

headline: Padres' Ty France: Tallies four RBI in win
body: France went 2-for-3 with a double, a triple, four RBI, a run scored, a stolen base and a walk in Monday's win over the Cubs.

headline: Padres' Mason Miller: Scoreless streak snapped Monday
body: Miller allowed two runs on three hits and no walks while striking out one over one inning in Monday's 9-7 win over the Cubs.

headline: Cubs' Matthew Boyd: Ambushed early in no-decision
body: Boyd did not factor into the decision Monday, allowing five runs on eight hits and two walks over four-plus innings against the Padres. He struck out four.

headline: Padres' Randy Vasquez: Grinds for third win
body: Vasquez (3-0) earned the win Monday, allowing five runs on five hits and three walks over five innings against the Cubs. He struck out four.

headline: Twins' Trevor Larnach: Pair of hits, stolen base in win
body: Larnach went 2-for-4 with a triple, an RBI, a run scored, a stolen base and a walk in Monday's 11-4 win over Seattle.

headline: Angels' Jorge Soler: Clubs sixth homer
body: Soler went 1-for-4 with a solo home run and three total RBI in a loss to the White Sox on Monday.

headline: White Sox's Munetaka Murakami: Takes over MLB homer lead
body: Murakami went 2-for-4 with a three-run home run in Monday's 8-7 victory versus the Angels.

headline: Twins' Ryan Jeffers: Plates two in win
body: Jeffers went 2-for-4 with two RBI, two runs scored, a stolen base and a walk in Monday's 11-4 victory over Seattle.

headline: Angels' Jack Kochanowicz: Let down by bullpen Monday
body: Kochanowicz finished with a no-decision Monday against the White Sox, allowing three runs (two earned) on five hits and one walk while striking out five batters over six innings.

headline: Twins' Kody Clemens: Tallies five RBI in win
body: Clemens went 2-for-5 with a three-run home run and two additional RBI in Monday's victory over the Mariners.

headline: Dodgers' Shohei Ohtani: Limited to pitching Tuesday
body: Ohtani will start Tuesday's game against the Marlins on the mound but won't bat, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.

headline: White Sox's Bryan Hudson: Notches save Monday
body: Hudson earned a save against the Angels on Monday by retiring the only batter he faced.

headline: Mariners' Luis Castillo: Surrenders seven runs
body: Castillo (0-2) took the loss Monday, allowing seven runs on seven hits and two walks over five innings against Minnesota. He struck out three.

headline: White Sox's Anthony Kay: Struggles again Monday
body: Kay allowed four runs on seven hits and two walks while striking out two batters over four innings in a no-decision against the Angels on Monday.

headline: Twins' Connor Prielipp: Earns first win Monday
body: Prielipp (1-0) earned the win Monday, allowing two runs on a hit and three walks over five innings against the Mariners. He struck out five.

headline: Marlins' Pete Fairbanks: Battling thumb injury
body: Fairbanks left Monday's game against the Dodgers with a right thumb injury, Fish on First reports.

headline: Cubs' Scott Kingery: Reporting to Triple-A
body: Kingery was sent outright to Triple-A Iowa on Monday, per MLB's transactions log.

headline: Marlins' Pete Fairbanks: Leaves with unspecified injury
body: Fairbanks left Monday's game against the Dodgers due to an undisclosed injury, Alden Gonzalez of ESPN.com reports.

headline: Royals' Eli Morgan: Returned to Triple-A
body: Morgan was optioned to Triple-A Omaha on Monday, per MLB's transactions log.

headline: Padres' Manny Machado: Exits with injury
body: Machado left Monday's game against the Cubs with an unspecified injury, 97.3 The Fan reports.

headline: Cubs' Trent Thornton: Makes return from IL
body: Thornton (Achilles) was activated from the 7-day injured list Friday.

headline: Cardinals' JJ Wetherholt: Third straight game with homer
body: Wetherholt went 1-for-4 with a solo home run in Monday's 4-2 win over the Pirates.

headline: Astros' Ethan Pecko: Activated from 7-day IL
body: Pecko (thoracic outlet syndrome) was activated from the 7-day injured list Friday.

headline: Cardinals' George Soriano: Nabs rare save Monday
body: Soriano secured the save Monday against the Pirates, allowing no runs on one hit and no walks in the ninth inning. He struck out one.

headline: Yankees' Jasson Dominguez: Records one hit in season debut
body: Dominguez went 1-for-4 with a strikeout in Monday's 4-2 win against Texas.

headline: Cubs' Gavin Hollowell: Back from IL
body: Hollowell (undisclosed) was activated from the 7-day injured list Saturday.
